eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Lane, OR; at 1:34 PM on JUN 11, 2026 Effective until 2:34 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a coordinated monthly test of the Emergency Alert System, generated by the Lane County Sheriff's Office. If this had been an actual emergency, the tones would have been followed by official news and instructions. This concludes this test of the Emergency Alert System.
